use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
use std::collections::HashMap;

// BAD: #[serde(flatten)] catch-all that absorbs unknown fields
#[derive(Deserialize, Serialize)]
struct UserConfig {
    name: String,
    email: String,
    #[serde(flatten)]
    extra: HashMap<String, serde_json::Value>,
}

#[derive(Deserialize, Serialize)]
struct ApiRequest {
    action: String,
    #[serde(flatten)]
    params: serde_json::Value,
}

#[derive(Deserialize, Serialize)]
struct Event {
    event_type: String,
    timestamp: u64,
    #[serde(flatten)]
    payload: HashMap<String, String>,
}
